MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Eadie Jackson, appearing on her own behalf. Bradley A. Russi, Deputy City Attorney appearing for Defendant City and County of San Francisco. Order to Show Cause to Self-represented Plaintiff for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered the OSC off calendar and dissolved for good cause. Court ordered monetary sanctions issued to Plaintiff on 1/27/2011 in the amount of $100.00 and on 3/24/2011 in the amount of $250.00, vacated for good cause. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
